title: Someone made an Unofficial Documentary about the Dub
display_title: Someone made an Unofficial Documentary about the Dub
wikitext:
[]: Someone made an Unofficial Documentary about the Dub             Quote Post by C.A.P. » Tue Apr 15, 2025 2:35 am And it’s nearly 3 hours long. There’s insight in here I’ve never heard before. It’s too important for this site to ignore, we need to discuss this. I’m still watching it. One crazy fact you learn in this: Saban came this close to getting the rights themselves, but plans fell through. I cross fingers we discuss this.

[]: Re: Someone made an Unofficial Documentary about the Dub             Quote Post by DTGee » Tue Apr 15, 2025 2:02 pm Thanks for the shout out! I actually already made a thread for this in the Fan Works forum if you want to maybe discus it there. thread/21826/Bringing-Evangelion-to-America/
